PROP-01b-partial-inv-001.text: Reentrancy guard must prevent re-entry during bid callback execution.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-001.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount, data): s_entered == true during callback => re-entry reverts

PROP-01b-partial-inv-002.text: Flash-loan pattern: asset transferred to bidder before assetOut pulled from bidder.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-002.assertion: forall bid(): transfer(asset, bidder) happens-before transferFrom(bidder, assetOut)

PROP-01b-partial-inv-003.text: Bid callback must not allow state manipulation that reduces assetOut payment amount.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-003.assertion: forall bid(data != empty): assetOutAmount is fixed before callback, transferFrom uses same value

PROP-01b-partial-pre-001.text: Bid must revert if auction is not live (auctionStart == 0 or duration elapsed).
PROP-01b-partial-pre-001.assertion: forall bid(asset): auctionStart == 0 OR elapsed > duration => revert InvalidAuction

PROP-01b-partial-inv-004.text: Bid amount must not exceed contract's available balance of the auctioned asset.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-004.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount): amount <= balanceOf(address(this), asset)

PROP-01b-partial-pre-002.text: Bid USD value must meet minimum threshold (minBidUsdValue).
PROP-01b-partial-pre-002.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount): bidUsdValue(amount, price) >= s_minBidUsdValue

PROP-01b-partial-inv-005.text: Price multiplier decreases linearly from startingPM to endingPM over auction duration.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-005.assertion: forall t in [0, duration]: pm(t) == startPM - (startPM - endPM) * t / duration

PROP-01b-partial-inv-006.text: Elapsed time clamped to auctionDuration prevents extra price decay past auction end.

PROP-01b-partial-inv-007.text: AssetOut amount rounding via mulDivUp/mulWadUp must favor protocol (bidder pays more).
PROP-01b-partial-inv-007.assertion: forall getAssetOutAmount(): roundUp(auctionUsdValue * assetOutDecimals / price) >= exact_value

PROP-01b-partial-pre-003.text: performUpkeep must revert if starting auction for asset with existing live auction.

PROP-01b-partial-post-001.text: Auction start sets s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp exactly.

PROP-01b-partial-post-002.text: Auction end deletes s_auctionStarts[asset] and returns remaining asset to feeAggregator.
PROP-01b-partial-post-002.assertion: forall onAuctionEnd(asset): post(s_auctionStarts[asset]) == 0 AND remainingBalance transferred

PROP-01b-partial-post-003.text: Accumulated assetOut from bids must be forwarded to assetOutReceiver on auction end.
PROP-01b-partial-post-003.assertion: forall onAuctionEnd(): assetOutBal > 0 => transfer(assetOut, assetOutReceiver, assetOutBal)

PROP-01b-partial-inv-009.text: checkUpkeep clears eligible assets when assetOut price is invalid (no auctions with bad price).

PROP-01b-partial-inv-010.text: Only assets with valid price, no live auction, and balance >= minAuctionSizeUsd are eligible.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-010.assertion: forall eligible(asset): isPriceValid AND auctionStart == 0 AND usdValue >= minAuctionSizeUsd

PROP-01b-partial-inv-011.text: Auction ends if duration elapsed OR remaining balance USD below minAuctionSizeUsd.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-011.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(asset): ended iff (elapsed > duration OR (valid AND balUsd < minAuctionSizeUsd))

PROP-01b-partial-inv-012.text: transmit() must reject stale reports (observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - staleness).

PROP-01b-partial-inv-013.text: Price must be scaled to exactly 18 decimals before storage regardless of feed decimals.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-013.assertion: forall transmit(report): stored_price == raw_price * 10^(18 - feedDecimals) when feedDecimals < 18

PROP-01b-partial-inv-014.text: Zero price after decimal scaling must revert (prevents zero-cost asset acquisition).

PROP-01b-partial-inv-015.text: Data Streams price prioritized over Data Feed; fallback only when streams stale and feed configured.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-015.assertion: forall getAssetPrice(): use_feed iff streamsUpdatedAt < minTimestamp AND usdDataFeed != 0

PROP-01b-partial-inv-016.text: When both prices stale, most recent timestamp wins between Data Streams and Data Feed.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-016.assertion: forall getAssetPrice(): use_feed iff dataFeedUpdatedAt > streamsUpdatedAt

PROP-01b-partial-inv-017.text: Negative data feed answer must revert via SafeCast.toUint256 (no negative prices).
PROP-01b-partial-inv-017.assertion: forall getAssetPrice(feed): answer < 0 => revert SafeCast overflow

PROP-01b-partial-asm-001.text: Bidders are untrusted: all bid inputs (asset, amount, data) are attacker-controlled.
PROP-01b-partial-asm-001.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount, data): inputs are externally controlled, no trust assumed

PROP-01b-partial-asm-002.text: Price feed data is semi-trusted: staleness and manipulation within PriceManager is in scope.
PROP-01b-partial-asm-002.assertion: forall transmit(): feed data verified externally, but staleness/zero checks are local responsibility

PROP-01b-partial-inv-021.text: Funds pulled from feeAggregator before auction starts (no bidding on unfunded auctions).
PROP-01b-partial-inv-021.assertion: forall performUpkeep(start): transferForSwap() executes before s_auctionStarts[asset] = timestamp

PROP-01b-partial-inv-022.text: performUpkeep reverts if eligible asset balance below minAuctionSizeUsd (no dust auctions).

PROP-01b-partial-inv-023.text: If eligible asset is assetOut itself, transfer full balance to assetOutReceiver (no auction).
PROP-01b-partial-inv-023.assertion: forall performUpkeep(asset == assetOut): transfer(fullBalance, assetOutReceiver), no auctionStart set

PROP-01b-partial-inv-024.text: All feed IDs must be allowlisted before bulk verification in transmit().
PROP-01b-partial-inv-024.assertion: forall transmit(reports): forall r in reports: feedIdToAsset[r.feedId] != address(0)

PROP-01b-partial-inv-025.text: getAssetOutAmount view returns 0 for invalid auctions instead of reverting (view-safe).

PROP-01b-partial-inv-026.text: View getAssetOutAmount caps input amount to available balance (no phantom liquidity).

PROP-01b-partial-inv-031.text: checkUpkeep gas must be bounded: iteration over s_allowlistedAssets must not exceed block gas.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-031.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): gasUsed <= blockGasLimit for all allowlisted asset counts

PROP-01b-partial-inv-032.text: Price decay must be monotonically non-increasing over auction duration.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-032.assertion: forall t1 < t2 <= duration: priceMultiplier(t1) >= priceMultiplier(t2)

PROP-01b-partial-inv-033.text: Bid settlement must transfer exact computed assetOut amount (no truncation or rounding down).
PROP-01b-partial-inv-033.assertion: forall bid(): transferFrom(bidder, this, assetOutAmount) where assetOutAmount == _getAssetOutAmount()

PROP-01b-partial-inv-034.text: Auction end via performUpkeep must only process assets with non-zero auctionStart.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-034.assertion: forall performUpkeep(ended): s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0 => valid; == 0 => revert InvalidAuction

PROP-01b-partial-inv-035.text: int192 to uint256 cast for price must revert on negative values (SafeCast protection).

PROP-01b-partial-inv-036.text: Decimal scaling precision loss: price / 10^(feedDecimals-18) must not truncate to zero for small prices.

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-001.text: bid() reentrancy guard must prevent re-entry via attacker-controlled callback execution.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-001.assertion: forall bid(asset, amount, data): s_entered == true during callback => re-entry to bid() reverts ReentrantCall()

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-002.text: s_entered reentrancy flag shared between bid() and isValidSignature() must block cross-function re-entry.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-002.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): s_entered==true => isValidSignature(hash,sig) reverts ReentrantCall()

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-003.text: bid() transfers asset to bidder BEFORE pulling assetOut, enabling flash-loan bids via callback.

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-004.text: bid() callback executes attacker-controlled code with transferred assets before assetOut is pulled.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-004.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): data.length>0 => callback(bidder,assetOut,assetOutAmt,data) called after transfer

PROP-01b-partial1-pre-001.text: bid() must reject bids where bidUsdValue is below minBidUsdValue threshold.
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-001.assertion: forall bid(asset,amount,data): bidUsdValue(amount) >= minBidUsdValue => proceed; else revert BidValueTooLow

PROP-01b-partial1-pre-002.text: bid() must reject bids where amount exceeds contract's current balance of the auctioned asset.
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-002.assertion: forall bid(asset,amount,data): amount <= balanceOf(this) => proceed; else revert BidAmountTooHigh

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-005.text: Auction price must decay monotonically from startingPriceMultiplier to endingPriceMultiplier over duration.

PROP-01b-partial1-pre-003.text: bid() must revert if no active auction exists for the asset (auctionStart == 0 or expired).
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-003.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): s_auctionStarts[asset]!=0 AND elapsed<=duration => proceed; else revert

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-006.text: isValidSignature must validate GPv2Order hash matches recomputed hash from decoded order data.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-006.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): hash == GPv2Order.hash(decode(sig),domainSep) => proceed; else revert

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-007.text: isValidSignature must enforce buyToken == s_assetOut to prevent solver specifying arbitrary output token.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-007.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.buyToken == s_assetOut; else revert InvalidBuyToken

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-008.text: isValidSignature must enforce receiver == address(this) to prevent diverting bought tokens.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-008.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.receiver == address(this); else revert InvalidReceiver

PROP-01b-partial1-inv-009.text: isValidSignature must enforce buyAmount >= minBuyAmount from price curve to prevent underpaying solver.

PROP-01b-partial1-pre-004.text: isValidSignature must reject orders with sellAmount == 0 to prevent zero-value settlements.
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-004.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.sellAmount > 0; else revert InvalidZeroAmount
